case_title: JIAXIN YAN ET AL VS. YUNCHENG GU

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY YAN, JIAXIN AS TO DEFENDANT GU, YUNCHENG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAN, JIAXIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GU, YUNCHENG YAN, BIXING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2021 - JUDGMENT. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF JIAXIN YAN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY HWA SING AWEI, COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPERTER. DEFENDANT YUNCHENG GU, BI XING YAN ARE PRESENT ASSISTED BY CONNIE CHAN, MANDARIN INTERPERTER, PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GU, YUNCHENG YAN, BIXING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT YAN, JIAXIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
